ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "original_list_price" TEXT /* Original listing price of the property */,
  "list_price_at_time_of_sale" TEXT /* Listing price at the time of sale */,
  "selling_price" TEXT /* Final selling price of the property */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale was closed */,
  "days_on_market" INTEGER /* Number of days the property was on the market */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of property */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood where the property is located */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "parking" TEXT /* Parking information (e.g., garage, street, none) */,
  "features" TEXT /* Additional features of the property (e.g., pool, yard, view) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the agent */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Real estate license number of the agent */,
  "office_address" TEXT /* Address of the agent's office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the client */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred contact method (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "pre_approved" INTEGER /* Whether the client is pre-approved for a mortgage */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Client's budget for property purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property being sold */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent handling the sale */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client purchasing the property */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Final sale price of the property */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale was closed */,
  "commission_percentage" TEXT /* Commission percentage earned by the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sale associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., commission, closing costs) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property analyzed (e.g., single-family home, condo) */,
  "average_price" TEXT /* Average selling price of properties in the market */,
  "median_price" TEXT /* Median selling price of properties in the market */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of sales in the analyzed period */,
  "analysis_period" TEXT /* Time period for the analysis (e.g., Q1 2023) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the market analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "average_price" TEXT /* Average property price in the neighborhood */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of property sales in the neighborhood */,
  "school_district" TEXT /* School district serving the neighborhood */,
  "transportation" TEXT /* Transportation options available in the neighborhood */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available in the neighborhood (e.g., parks, shopping) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type (e.g., single-family home, condo) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "avg_price_range" TEXT /* Average price range for properties of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., agent, client, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view sales data, manage listings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "open_houses" (
  "open_house_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each open house */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property being showcased */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the open house */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the open house */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the open house */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the open house */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("open_house_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property view */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property being viewed */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client viewing the property */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparative_market_analysis" (
  "cma_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CMA */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property being analyzed */,
  "comparable_properties" TEXT /* List of comparable properties used in the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the CMA was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cma_id")
)
